title: Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala
tagline: Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Saumyakeshava temple (also spelt Sauymakesava or Soumyakeshava) at Nagamangala was constructed in the 12th century by the rulers of the Hoysala empire.
overview.description: The Saumyakeshava temple (also spelt Sauymakesava or Soumyakeshava) at Nagamangala was constructed in the 12th century by the rulers of the Hoysala empire. Nagamangala is a town in the Mandya district of Karnataka state, India. It is located 62 km from the historically important town Mysore, on the Srirangapatna-Sira highway. Historically, Nagamangala came into prominence during the rule of Hoysala King Vishnuvardhana when it became an important center of Vaishnava faith and received patronage from one of his queens, Bommaladevi.

topPlaces.name: Nagamangala
topPlaces.description: Nagamangala is a PuraSabhe and a taluk in Mandya district, in the Indian state of Karnataka. Nagamangala lies on the junction between NH-150A and SH-85.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala?
faq.a: The best time to visit Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala?
faq.a: Stays in Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Saumyakeshava Temple, Nagamangala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nagamangala, A. Sriramanahalli, A. Shanboganahalli.
